title: Angel One Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Angel One Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Angel One Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Angel One Ventures Solutions:
Angel One Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One Ventures Solutions!
